inputs: AGENT-293 prepared sbatch; TODO-PRED-FORWARD-V0; input contract
edits_allowed: new status/journal/work_product only unless explicitly claiming scheduler output package
objective: Run full Fluid solve_case confirmation for forward-v0 on compute node and compare against fast_scan
acceptance_signal: completed compute-node package with solve_case-vs-fast_scan mdot pressure Tmean loop-delta and heat-delta metrics
depends_on: compute allocation/user permission to submit sbatch
guardrails: do not run long solve_case on login node; do not change native CFD outputs

inputs: predictive_hydraulic_gate; AGENT-262 pressure mesh package; reset/named-loss lit gates
edits_allowed: new tools/analyze script/test and dated work_product if claimed
objective: Fit or rank low-dimensional friction/minor-loss/profile corrections using only fit-safe pressure evidence
acceptance_signal: mdot error reduced or failure explained with pressure residual score; no thermal parameter changes
guardrails: do not train on pressure recovery/noise rows; do not absorb mdot error into thermal terms

edits_allowed: HX package refresh only if row is reclaimed; otherwise doc reconciliation
objective: Reconcile board/package status and freeze one-scalar HX/cooler correction policy
acceptance_signal: one declared scalar trained on salt_2; salt_3 validation and salt_4 holdout scores preserved; protocol status unambiguous
guardrails: no per-case HX multipliers; no refit after holdout inspection

edits_allowed: Fluid/bridge edits only after explicit external repo claim; repo-local prototype otherwise
objective: Add or prototype segment/patch external BC dictionaries carrying h Ta Tsur emissivity layers and drive selectors
acceptance_signal: API contract and tests show predictive boundaries without realized wallFlux replay or double radiation
depends_on: none, but external Fluid claim needed for real API edit
guardrails: do not call fixed CFD wallHeatFlux a predictive boundary

inputs: AGENT-291 fine repair; AGENT-267 medium repair; closure QOI mesh package
edits_allowed: thermal extraction/GCI scripts and dated work_product if claimed
objective: Classify Salt2 HTC/Nu/UA/section heat QOIs by mesh/sign/heat-balance readiness
acceptance_signal: each QOI labeled publication-ready diagnostic two-level blocked-sign blocked-missing-triplet or blocked-downcomer-policy
depends_on: AGENT-291 evidence harvest terminal; no long login-node jobs
guardrails: do not fit thermal closure from repaired values before gate passes

inputs: Fluid sensor docs/source; CFD/experimental sensor tables; forward-v0 sensor outputs
edits_allowed: sensor-map docs/scripts and dated work_product if claimed
objective: Map TP/TW sensors to 1D path positions with uncertainty and scoring permissions
acceptance_signal: sensor contract names runtime inputs versus validation targets and emits scoreable sensor rows
guardrails: sensor temperatures are score targets only; no runtime use

inputs: outputs from A/B/C plus input contract and validation split
edits_allowed: scorecard runner/test and dated work_product if claimed
objective: Assemble heater-only plus admitted hydraulic correction plus one-scalar HX correction and score split
acceptance_signal: train validation holdout scorecard with residual attribution; no diagnostic CFD leakage
depends_on: A solve_case if possible; B hydraulic correction; C HX policy
guardrails: do not publish final score until gates and blockers are explicit
